review_criteria: Verify git show strictly matches the execution result artifact.
Verify the implementation changes are limited to modifying files in 'documentation/EN/', 'documentation/ZH/', and 'README.md'.
Verify the documentation has been deeply enriched with concrete examples, JSON payloads, and CLI commands.
Verify the creation of EXTENSION_GUIDE.md detailing custom adapter development.
Verify the presence of comprehensive Mermaid diagrams mapping the state machine and dual-track gating.
Verify NO implementation of .agent-state/ physical migrations occurred.
Verify NO modifications to src/ or MCP server logic occurred.
Verify NO modifications to active workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json state semantics occurred.
Verify artifact changes are strictly limited to allowed_artifacts.
